species: CircMAN1A2_009 facilitates YBX1 nuclear localization to induce GLO1 activation for cervical adenocarcinoma cell growth
cell_type: FISH analysis and qRT‐PCR analysis indicated its presence in both the nucleus and cytoplasm of HeLa cells
cell_line: HeLa cells were transfected with either control siRNA or siRNA specifically targeting circMAN1A2_009
